name: pbi-mcp-ts
description: Power BI report (PBIR) authoring for Claude Code — 47-tool TypeScript MCP server + 16 skills + 7 subagents (incl. modeling validators: BPA-style DAX + grain + relationship pre-flight) + validation hook + layout primitives + 3 LLM-composed dashboard scaffolds + DAX measure synthesis + multi-fact-table reasoning + date intelligence pattern library. Pairs with @microsoft/powerbi-modeling-mcp for full Power BI capability across modeling and report layers.
